chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 737 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.4455/2022 13.02.2023 Mr. Shamsuddin N. Kobhar, Advocate for the applicant/surety. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant application, the applicant/surety, namely, Jangi Khan S/o Din Muhammad Kobhar, seeks return of his surety document furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears from the record that accused, namely, Jatoi, Khan Muhammad alias Aijaz, Ghulam Mustafa, Deen Muhammad, Khair Muhammad, Shoukat Ali and Rajib Ali were granted interim pre-arrest bail in Crime No.222 of 2019, registered at Police Station Dehrai, by this Court vide order dated 26.12.2019, whereas, the applicant had stood surety on behalf of the said accused by depositing original Solvency Certificate No.23 dated 24.12.2018, issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Daharki. Subsequently, on 04.02.2020, instant bail application was dismissed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to the accused vide order dated 26.12.2019 was recalled. Learned Counsel for the applicant, while placing on record photocopy of certified copy of order dated 11.06.2022 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Ubauro in Sessions Case No.165 of 2020, states that the accused have been acquitted by the trial Court under Section 265-K, Cr.P.C; hence, he prays for return of return of surety. Learned Assistant P.G. records his no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 17.10.2022.

Learned Assistant P.G. records his no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 17.10.2022. In view of above, the listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document as furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court to the applicant/surety after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
